title: Panda (transports)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|a pair of Rebel shuttles|[[Panda|creatures with the same name]]}}
'''''Panda''''' group was a pair of [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. When the Alliance succeeded in stranding the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Priam (starship)|''Priam'']] near [[Kalla VII]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] gave the order for a "board and capture" operation against the ''Priam''.

A strike by [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron's]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] disabled the ship and [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]] from [[Assault (transports)|''Assault'']] group delivered commandos from [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] to capture the vessel. Once captured, ''Panda 1'' delivered officers and ''Panda 2'' brought an Alliance crew to take control of the ship while transport group ''[[Jordi]]'' delivered supplies. Once all the transports were aboard, the Rebel forces, along with the newly captured frigate, jumped to hyperspace.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
